name: whatsapp_list_accounts
description: List all configured WhatsApp accounts and their connection statuses

name: whatsapp_get_status
description: Get current WhatsApp connection status, phone number, and QR code

name: whatsapp_logout
description: Logout from WhatsApp and clear saved session credentials

name: whatsapp_send_text
description: Send a text message to a user or group with optional @mentions

name: whatsapp_send_image
description: Send an image from URL or base64 with optional caption

name: whatsapp_send_document
description: Send a document file from URL

name: whatsapp_send_audio
description: Send an audio message from URL

name: whatsapp_send_video
description: Send a video from URL with optional caption

name: whatsapp_send_reaction
description: React to a message with an emoji

name: whatsapp_send_poll
description: Send a poll message with multiple options

name: whatsapp_delete_message
description: Delete a sent message (within 48-hour window)

name: whatsapp_get_messages
description: Retrieve recent messages from the in-memory store, optionally filtered by JID

name: whatsapp_check_number
description: Check if a phone number has an active WhatsApp account

name: whatsapp_list_groups
description: List all WhatsApp groups the connected account is a member of

name: whatsapp_get_group_info
description: Get detailed metadata for a group including participants

name: whatsapp_create_group
description: Create a new WhatsApp group with initial participants

name: whatsapp_add_participants
description: Add participants to an existing group

name: whatsapp_remove_participants
description: Remove participants from a group

name: whatsapp_update_group_subject
description: Update the name/subject of a WhatsApp group

name: whatsapp_update_group_description
description: Update the description of a WhatsApp group

name: whatsapp_get_invite_link
description: Get the invite link for a WhatsApp group

name: whatsapp_leave_group
description: Leave a WhatsApp group
